vietnamese: có nhiều cơ hội nghề nghiệp
example: City life has more career opportunities.
The city has many entertainments like cinemas and parks.

vietnamese: sống gần bệnh viện, trường học
example: We live near hospitals, schools, and supermarkets.

word: enjoy the fresh and clean air
vietnamese: tận hưởng không khí trong lành
example: In the countryside, we enjoy the fresh and clean air.
The countryside brings me a clean and quiet environment.
The cost of living is cheap, so I save a lot of money.
